description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof and a rectangular layout, featuring a mix of white and gray exterior walls. The property includes a driveway with a parked car, a small front yard with a large tree, and a backyard with additional greenery and a swing set. Large windows line the main facade, providing ample natural light to the interior living spaces. The house has a prominent wooden awning over the entryway, which is set back from the street and partially shielded by trees. The backyard is enclosed by fencing, offering privacy and a defined outdoor area. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of white and gray exterior walls, set on a lot with a driveway, front yard, and fenced backyard.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from the driveway side, highlighting the carport, front yard, and the main entryway under a wooden awning.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the house from the street-facing side, displaying the long row of windows, the main facade, and the front yard with a large tree.
description_view_2: View 2 captures the backyard and rear facade, showing the fenced garden, swing set, and the back of the house with additional windows.
description_view_3: View 3 provides a side view, emphasizing the driveway, car, and the side fencing that encloses the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large horizontal windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a flat wooden awning, no steps, and minimalistic design
